framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折). History in geopulse.db

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Kuwaiti VLCC Al-Salmi struck at Dubai port, Iran missiles at Israel (Jerusalem sirens)
history.note: Day 39. ★★★★★ MAJOR ESCALATION: (1) Iran drone struck Kuwaiti VLCC Al-Salmi at Dubai port — FULLY LADEN, fire onboard, hull damage, oil spill risk (Bloomberg/NYT/CBS/Guardian Mar 31); (2) Iran fired NEW missile salvo at Israel Tuesday — IDF intercepting, sirens in Jerusalem (CBS Mar 31); (3) Kuwait air defenses responding to hostile missile+drone attacks; (4) IDF 170 targets/24h including Tehran (IDF); (5) IDF new wave 'in heart of Tehran' Monday night; (6) Houthis SUSTAINED 2+ waves at Israel — INDEPENDENT; (7) Hezbollah CONTINUING — Netanyahu expanded Lebanon ops; (8) CENTCOM 10,000+ targets struck; (9) US KIA: 15 confirmed (Wikipedia) + 313 wounded (Spectrum); (10) Iran: 2,076+ killed (Health Ministry), HRANA 3,486+; (11) Russia providing satellite imagery to Iran (ISW/Zelensky); (12) SOF (Rangers/SEALs) deployed — not yet assigned missions but could safeguard Hormuz (NYT). PATTERN: IRGC volume collapsed BUT ★★★ Kuwaiti tanker attack at DUBAI PORT = ECONOMIC WARFARE ON NEUTRAL SHIPPING — attacks moving from military to COMMERCIAL INFRASTRUCTURE at MAJOR ports. 3 INDEPENDENT fronts active (IRGC residual + Houthis sustained + Hezbollah). Source: Bloomberg/NYT/CBS/Guardian/Wikipedia/Spectrum/ISW/IDF

history.note: Day 42. ★★★★★ PATTERN BREAK — JOINT SALVO: (1) IRGC launched NEW coordinated wave: 100+ heavy missiles + attack drones + 200+ rockets — JOINT with Houthis + Hezbollah (Moneycontrol/TheHindu Apr 1); (2) Houthis '3rd military operation targeting sensitive Israeli targets with ballistic missiles' — jointly with Iran + Hezbollah (Yahya Saree statement); (3) This is SIGNIFICANT REVERSAL from 1-2/day declining pattern — suggests coordinated multi-front salvo capability REMAINS; (4) Trump claims Pezeshkian asked for ceasefire (TruthSocial Apr 1) — Iran calls it 'false, baseless'; (5) IRGC 18-company deadline at 20:00 Tehran Apr 1 — UNTESTED at pipeline time; (6) A-10 Warthogs deploying to Hormuz as ground operation option emerges (ArmyRecognition Apr 1); (7) Argentina designated IRGC terrorist org (Mar 31); (8) US KIA: 15+ confirmed + 300+ wounded; (9) IDF continuing Tehran strikes; (10) Iran: HRANA 3,486+ killed. CRITICAL: Joint salvo BREAKS the 1-2/day pattern — must monitor if this is one-off coordinated show-of-force or return to mass salvos. 3 INDEPENDENT fronts CONFIRMED ACTIVE simultaneously. Source: Moneycontrol/TheHindu/ArmyRecognition/Reuters/CNBC/Axios

history.est: ~3-4 mbd (4-6 ships/day, COSCO 2 ships confirmed, Kuwaiti tanker STRUCK at Dubai — transit recovery THREATENED)
history.note: Day 39. ★★★★★ TRANSIT + TANKER ATTACK: (1) ★★★ Kuwaiti VLCC Al-Salmi STRUCK by Iran drone at Dubai port anchorage — fully laden, fire, hull damage, oil spill risk (Bloomberg Mar 31). 31nm NW of Dubai = most significant vessel attack to date; (2) COSCO 2 state-backed container ships transited Hormuz Monday on 2nd attempt — first major Chinese state company since war (Reuters); (3) Trump claimed 20 ships Monday — UNVERIFIED; (4) USNI/Lloyd's: 142 transits Mar 1-25 vs 2,652 same period 2025 = 94.6% decline; (5) Iran parliament pursuing formal Hormuz sovereignty codification + fee collection (NPR); (6) Bessent: 'US will retake straits through escorts'; (7) ~3,000 vessels waiting (NYT); (8) Oxford: impassable until May. ★★★ Kuwaiti tanker attack DIRECTLY THREATENS trickle recovery — attacks on laden tankers at major ports = MAXIMUM insurance/shipping deterrence. Still 95% below pre-crisis. Source: Bloomberg/Reuters/NYT/NPR/USNI/CBS

fp1_china_action.label: 中国实质行动(唯一可行聚点注入)
fp1_china_action.status: INSTITUTIONAL ESCALATION — China-Pakistan 5-point plan presented, CNN brokers China mediator role, Zhai Jun touring, BUT Iran-Oman PERMANENT Hormuz protocol = China's Hormuz clause BYPASSED
fp1_china_action.findings: Day 44. ★★★★★ CHINA BROKER SIGNAL + IRAN OMAN BYPASS: (1) CNN Apr 1: 'Is China positioning itself to become US-Iran peace broker?' — Zhai Jun touring region (CNN); (2) China-Pakistan 5-point plan presented: ceasefire + peace talks + civilian protection + HORMUZ RESTORATION + overall framework (Reuters/Guardian Mar 31); (3) ★★★ BUT Iran Deputy FM Apr 2: drafting PERMANENT protocol with OMAN (not China) to oversee Hormuz even in peacetime (NYT Apr 2) — THIS BYPASSES China-Pakistan plan's Hormuz clause; (4) Irish Times: China does NOT see itself as mediator; (5) 3 Chinese ships transited Hormuz via coordination (MFA Mao Ning Mar 31); (6) Pakistan emerged as key backchannel (Newsweek); (7) Arms Control: 'unclear if Tehran willing to negotiate'; (8) UNSC gridlocked — Russia ceasefire draft FAILED. ASSESSMENT: China INSTITUTIONAL positioning continuing but Iran's Oman protocol = INDEPENDENT sovereignty move that doesn't need China's mediation. China's Hormuz restoration clause rendered MOOT if Iran establishes permanent oversight regime. Source: CNN/NYT/Reuters/Guardian/MFA/IrishTimes/ArmsControl

fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.label: 美方信号包内部矛盾(承诺解锁前导)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.status: EXTREME CONTRADICTION INTENSIFIED — Trump 'nearing completion' + 'extremely hard 2-3 weeks' + bridge strike SAME DAY; WTI +11%; Iran FM denies ALL negotiations; NO Hormuz escort; Apr 6 energy deadline 3 DAYS
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.findings: Day 44. ★★★★★ MAXIMUM RHETORIC-REALITY GAP + INFRASTRUCTURE TARGETING: (1) Trump primetime Apr 1: 'core objectives nearing completion' BUT Apr 2: vows 'extremely hard over next 2-3 weeks' (NYT/CNBC); (2) ★★★ US struck Iran's LARGEST BRIDGE near Karaj Apr 2 — 8 killed, 95 wounded, Trump: 'more to follow' (Guardian/BBC) = CIVILIAN INFRASTRUCTURE TARGETING while claiming wind-down; (3) WTI SPIKED 11% to USD111.54 — market REJECTS de-escalation (CNBC Apr 2); (4) Iran FM Araghchi: 'no negotiations, false and baseless' (AJE); (5) USNI: 'US has NOT undertaken naval escorts' — promised Mar 12, 3 weeks unfulfilled; (6) Rep Landsman (D-OH) who voted AGAINST War Powers now calls for war to end (WBUR Apr 2) = GOP-crossover pressure emerging; (7) Macron criticizes shifting US goals (NYT Apr 2); (8) Apr 6 energy deadline 3 DAYS — if no deal, strikes resume on energy infrastructure; (9) NatSec Dems demand ceasefire negotiation (House Armed Services). ASSESSMENT: Maximum paradox: victory claims + bridge strikes + 11% oil spike + zero escorts + Iran refusing talks. Apr 6 = BINARY: deal or massive energy escalation. Source: Guardian/BBC/CNBC/NYT/AJE/USNI/WBUR

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近
fp4_cost_threshold.status: APPROACHING THRESHOLD — Gas USD4.06/gal (+36% from pre-war), WTI USD111.54 (+11% single day), US KIA 13-15 + 520+ wounded (Pentagon coverup), War Powers mid-Apr vote, bridge strike = civilian target backlash risk
fp4_cost_threshold.findings: Day 44. ★★★★★ COST SPIRAL + CIVILIAN TARGETING BACKLASH RISK: (1) Gas USD4.06/gal national (AAA/SmartAsset), CA USD5.87+ — up 36%+ from pre-war USD2.98; (2) WTI SPIKED 11% to USD111.54 single day (CNBC Apr 2) — steepest daily gain since war; (3) Brent USD109.03 (+8%); (4) US KIA: 13 (NYT/Pentagon) to 15 (Wikipedia) + 520+ wounded (Intercept: Pentagon COVERING UP casualty figures); (5) ★★★ Bridge strike at Karaj: 8 killed, 95 wounded = CIVILIAN INFRASTRUCTURE — potential war crimes scrutiny + domestic backlash (Guardian/BBC); (6) War Powers vote DELAYED to mid-April — Congress on 2-week recess (Axios/DemocracyNow); (7) Rep Landsman (D-OH) who voted AGAINST War Powers NOW calls for war to end (WBUR) = erosion of bipartisan support; (8) Senate War Powers FAILED 53-47 party line (AJE); (9) IEA warns crunch worsening = gas prices likely CONTINUE rising; (10) S&P 500 6,583 (+0.11% Apr 2). ASSESSMENT: Domestic cost pressure ACCELERATING (gas + oil spike + casualty coverup + civilian target backlash) but institutional checks ABSENT (recess). Mid-April return + bridge strike footage = potential inflection. Apr 6 energy deadline = potential USD5+ gas. Source: AAA/CNBC/Intercept/Guardian/BBC/WBUR/Axios/IEA

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
